content.body:
When .leo/kb/ is present (pre-v0.8.0 install), runDoctorBase now prints
a clear migration prompt and exits with zero — skipping all normal checks
that would produce confusing errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(doctor): detect legacy .leo/kb/ layout and prompt migration (#76)
